name: Scandinavian Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Core, peel and slice apples.
2. Season the apple slices to taste with sugar and lemon juice.
3. Cook the apple slices in a small amount of water until they are tender.
4. Drain the cooked apples in a large strainer and press to extract excess water.
5. Pour melted butter into a 10-inch layer cake pan, spreading it evenly.
6. Sprinkle half of the toasted cake crumbs over the bottom of the pan.
7. Spread half of the apple slices over the crumbs.
8. Top with currant jelly, then mixed nuts, and another layer of crumbs.
9. Arrange macaroons in a layer over the crumbs.
10. Cover with the remaining apple slices and top with the remaining crumbs.
11. Bake at 450°F for 30 minutes.
12. Cool the cake in the refrigerator.
13. Sprinkle almonds lightly with water, then sprinkle with sugar.
14. Toast the almonds at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden.
15. Shake the pan after 10 minutes to prevent the almonds from sticking together.
16. Whip the cream and frost the cake.
17. Sprinkle with toasted almonds.
